heading: Procedures for disposal of records exclusive
label: 3314 Procedures for disposal of records exclusive
text: The procedures prescribed by this chapter are exclusive, and records of the United States Government may not be alienated or destroyed except under this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 380 (, ).July 7, 1943, ch. 192, § 1557 Stat. 383
